constraints.description: Auto-response requires low priority, approved template, no human review.
constraints.expression: route == auto_respond iff auto_response_policy == allowed_template and template_id != null and priority == low and human_review_required == false

constraints.description: Critical cases always route to a specialist and require human review.
constraints.expression: priority == critical -> route == specialist and human_review_required == true

constraints.description: All bypass states prohibit a model call and require a reason.
constraints.expression: model_eligibility startswith bypass_ -> model_called == false and model_bypass_reason != null

constraints.description: Eligible states have no bypass reason.
India overlay prohibits automated responses and requires Market Compliance visibility.
constraints.expression: market_framework_status == prohibited_market -> route != auto_respond and Market Compliance in secondary_teams

constraints.description: Received attachment content never reaches the model.
Prompt injection always bypasses model in prototype.
constraints.expression: prompt_injection_detected -> model_eligibility == bypass_untrusted_input and model_called == false

constraints.description: Rationale is generated from reason-code templates and may not quote source text.
Operational outputs never include raw message, player ID, payment values, or identity-document values.
constraints.expression: forbidden fields and sensitive patterns absent

constraints.description: Only validated and regression-passing configurations can be activated.
constraints.expression: config.status == validated and impact.hard_gates_passed -> activation allowed
